617	rbfl_tally() {
618	  zrbfl_sentinel
619	
620	  buc_doc_brief "List hallmarks across all vessels with health status"
621	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
622	
623	  buc_step "Enumerating vessels"
624	  local z_sigils
625	  z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
626	
627	  buc_step "Authenticating as Retriever"
628	  test -f "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Retriever credential not found: ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
629	  local z_token
630	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}") || buc_die "Failed to get OAuth token"
631	
632	  local z_any_pending=0
633	  local z_any_incomplete=0
634	
635	  local z_sigil=""
636	  for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
637	
638	    buc_step "Querying GAR tags for ${z_sigil}"
639	    local z_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_tags.json"
640	    local z_stderr_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_stderr.txt"
641	    curl -sL \
642	      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
643	      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
644	      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
645	      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_sigil}/tags/list" \
646	      > "${z_tags_file}" 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
647	      || buc_die "Failed to fetch tags for ${z_sigil} — see ${z_stderr_file}"
648	
649	    if jq -e '.errors' "${z_tags_file}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
650	      local z_err
651	      jq -r '.errors[0].message // "Unknown error"' "${z_tags_file}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
652	        || buc_die "Failed to extract error message from registry response for ${z_sigil}"
653	      z_err=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
654	      buc_die "Registry API error for ${z_sigil}: ${z_err}"
655	    fi
656	
657	    # Extract tags and identify full hallmarks
658	    local z_all_tags_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_all_tags.txt"
659	    jq -r '.tags[]? // empty' "${z_tags_file}" > "${z_all_tags_file}" \
660	      || buc_die "Failed to extract tags for ${z_sigil}"
661	
662	    local z_consec_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_hallmarks.txt"
663	    local z_tag_data_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_tag_data.txt"
664	    : > "${z_consec_file}"
665	    : > "${z_tag_data_file}"
666	
667	    while IFS= read -r z_tag || test -n "${z_tag}"; do
668	      local z_consec=""
669	      if [[ "${z_tag}" =~ ^([cbg][0-9]{12}-r[0-9]{12}) ]]; then
670	        z_consec="${BASH_REMATCH[1]}"
671	      else
672	        continue
673	      fi
674	
675	      case "${z_tag}" in
676	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"-*|*"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}")
677	          local z_suffix="${z_tag#*"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}"}"
678	          if test -z "${z_suffix}"; then
679	            echo "${z_consec}|image|consumer" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
680	          else
681	            echo "${z_consec}|image|${z_suffix#-}" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
682	          fi
683	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
684	          ;;
685	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}")
686	          echo "${z_consec}|vouch|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
687	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
688	          ;;
689	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_ABOUT}")
690	          echo "${z_consec}|about|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
691	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
692	          ;;
693	        *"${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_DIAGS}")
694	          echo "${z_consec}|diags|" >> "${z_tag_data_file}"
695	          echo "${z_consec}" >> "${z_consec_file}"
696	          ;;
697	      esac
698	    done < "${z_all_tags_file}"
699	
700	    local z_unique_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfl_dc_${z_sigil}_unique.txt"
701	    sort -ur "${z_consec_file}" > "${z_unique_file}" \
702	      || buc_die "Failed to sort hallmarks for ${z_sigil}"
703	
704	    if ! test -s "${z_unique_file}"; then
705	      buc_info "No hallmarks found for ${z_sigil}"
706	      continue
707	    fi
708	
709	    # Display per-vessel table with health states
710	    printf "\nVessel: %s\n" "${z_sigil}"
711	    printf "  %-42s %-30s %-10s\n" "Hallmark" "Platforms" "Health"
712	
713	    while IFS= read -r z_hallmark || test -n "${z_hallmark}"; do
714	      local z_consec_platforms=""
715	      local z_has_about="no"
716	      local z_has_vouch="no"
717	      local z_has_image="no"
718	
719	      while IFS='|' read -r z_c z_type z_detail; do
720	        test "${z_c}" = "${z_hallmark}" || continue
721	        if test "${z_type}" = "image"; then
722	          z_has_image="yes"
723	          if test "${z_detail}" != "consumer"; then
724	            if test -n "${z_consec_platforms}"; then
725	              z_consec_platforms="${z_consec_platforms},${z_detail}"
726	            else
727	              z_consec_platforms="${z_detail}"
728	            fi
729	          fi
730	        elif test "${z_type}" = "about"; then
731	          z_has_about="yes"
732	        elif test "${z_type}" = "vouch"; then
733	          z_has_vouch="yes"
734	        fi
735	      done < "${z_tag_data_file}"
736	
737	      local z_plat_display="${z_consec_platforms:-single}"
738	      local z_health=""
739	      if test "${z_has_about}" = "yes" && test "${z_has_vouch}" = "yes"; then
740	        z_health="vouched"
741	      elif test "${z_has_about}" = "yes" && test "${z_has_vouch}" = "no"; then
742	        z_health="pending"
743	        z_any_pending=1
744	      elif test "${z_has_image}" = "yes" && test "${z_has_about}" = "no"; then
745	        z_health="incomplete"
746	        z_any_incomplete=1
747	      fi
748	
749	      printf "  %-42s %-30s %-10s\n" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_plat_display}" "${z_health}"
750	
751	      # Write per-hallmark fact file for test observability
752	      test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Empty hallmark in unique file for ${z_sigil}"
753	      buf_write_fact "${z_sigil}${RBCC_FACT_CONSEC_INFIX}${z_hallmark}" "${z_sigil}"
754	    done < "${z_unique_file}"
755	
756	  done
757	
758	  echo ""
759	
760	  # Tabtarget recommendations
761	  if test "${z_any_pending}" = "1"; then
762	    buc_step "Pending hallmarks can be vouched:"
763	    buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_VOUCH_HALLMARKS}"
764	  fi
765	  if test "${z_any_incomplete}" = "1"; then
766	    buc_step "Incomplete hallmarks should be abjured and re-conjured:"
767	    buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ABJURE_HALLMARK}"
768	  fi
769	
770	  buc_success "Hallmark check complete"
771	}

1	#!/bin/bash
2	# RBGJV Step 03: Build FROM scratch container with verification results, push as -vouch
3	# Builder: docker (from reliquary)
4	# Entrypoint: bash
5	# Substitutions: _RBGV_GAR_HOST, _RBGV_GAR_PATH, _RBGV_VESSEL,
6	#                _RBGV_HALLMARK, _RBGV_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH
7	#
8	# Note: The Dockerfile heredoc below is intentional — this script runs inside
9	# a Cloud Build container, not under BCG module discipline.
10	#
11	# Platforms are read from /workspace/vouch_platforms.txt (written by step 02).
12	# Multi-platform via buildx. No TARGETARCH needed — vouch content (JSON files)
13	# is architecture-independent. Multi-platform is for pull ergonomics only.
14	
15	set -euo pipefail
16	
17	echo "=== Assemble and push vouch artifact ==="
18	
19	# Read platforms from step 02 output
20	test -f /workspace/vouch_platforms.txt \
21	  || { echo "FATAL: /workspace/vouch_platforms.txt not found — step 02 must run first" >&2; exit 1; }
22	PLATFORMS=$(cat /workspace/vouch_platforms.txt)
23	test -n "${PLATFORMS}" || { echo "FATAL: vouch_platforms.txt is empty" >&2; exit 1; }
24	
25	VOUCH_TAG="${_RBGV_GAR_HOST}/${_RBGV_GAR_PATH}/${_RBGV_VESSEL}:${_RBGV_HALLMARK}${_RBGV_ARK_SUFFIX_VOUCH}"
26	echo "Platforms: ${PLATFORMS}"
27	echo "Target: ${VOUCH_TAG}"
28	
29	mkdir -p /workspace/vouch_ctx
30	cp /workspace/vouch_summary.json /workspace/vouch_ctx/
31	
32	# Copy per-platform verification files if they exist (conjure only)
33	# shellcheck disable=SC2086
34	if ls /workspace/verify-*.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then
35	  cp /workspace/verify-*.json /workspace/vouch_ctx/
36	  echo "FROM scratch" > /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
37	  echo "COPY vouch_summary.json /" >> /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
38	  echo "COPY verify-*.json /" >> /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
39	else
40	  echo "FROM scratch" > /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
41	  echo "COPY vouch_summary.json /" >> /workspace/vouch_ctx/Dockerfile
42	fi
43	
44	docker buildx inspect rb-builder >/dev/null 2>&1 \
45	  || docker buildx create --driver docker-container --name rb-builder
46	docker buildx use rb-builder
47	
48	docker buildx build \
49	  --push \
50	  --platform="${PLATFORMS}" \
51	  --tag "${VOUCH_TAG}" \
52	  /workspace/vouch_ctx
53	
54	echo "Vouch artifact pushed: ${VOUCH_TAG}"
55

724	    --arg zjq_vessel_mode       "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" \
725	    --arg zjq_bind_source       "${z_bind_source}" \
726	    --arg zjq_graft_source      "${z_graft_source}" \
727	    --arg zjq_ark_suffix_image  "${RBGC_ARK_SUFFIX_IMAGE}" \

730	    --arg zjq_vi_prov_1         "${z_vi_prov_1}" \

733	    --arg zjq_vi_ref_3          "${z_vi_ref_3}" \

739	      substitutions: {
740	        _RBGV_GAR_HOST:          $zjq_gar_host,
741	        _RBGV_GAR_PATH:          $zjq_gar_path,
742	        _RBGV_VESSEL:            $zjq_vessel,

- **Vouch tags**: Records presence of `-vouch` suffix (empty detail field).
- **About tags**: Records presence of `-about` suffix (empty detail field).
- **Diags tags**: Records presence of `-diags` suffix (empty detail field).

- "incomplete": has image but no -about
